query:
ALTER TABLE meta_sync_schedule ADD COLUMN notify_user_id INT NULL;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS decay_notification_log (
  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  account_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  ad_id VARCHAR(64),
  ad_name TEXT,
  signal_level ENUM('emerging', 'possible', 'probable') NOT NULL,
  fatigue_score INT,
  first_detected_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  notified_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  notify_user_id INT,
  date_from VARCHAR(16),
  date_to VARCHAR(16),
  INDEX dnl_account_idx (account_id),
  INDEX dnl_notified_at_idx (notified_at)
);
